name: Jeong Hayeon | Quiet Rain
description:
Standing while you cry.

“...”

Request by: skybr1ght

“I guess i’d just stand there until they stop crying..”

Hayeon looks out the window, it pictures a gloomy blue, and rain is showering down on the world. It’s almost ethereal, beautiful, and a healing atmosphere. The teacher goes on, teaching the class as he normally does. Hayeon puts her head down on the desk and closes her eyes.

Ring-Ring

Students start to pack up and leave, the capture of the sound of footsteps, chairs being pushed in, and the goodbyes.

I know there’s no good in goodbye..

Hayeon is the last one to leave the classroom, she takes one more look at the pouring rain outside the window, before exiting through the door, not saying goodbye to the teacher. Just a dull, blank expression on her face.

She walks through the halls, carrying a hollow weight on her shoulders, she looks down at the grey marble floors as she walks, bypassing other students that make their way home.

You don’t know how loud my mind is, as well as you don’t know others.
creator: 𐌕𐌏𐌕𐌏
